2603.26754.title: Generating Synthetic Wildlife Health Data from Camera Trap Imagery: A Pipeline for Alopecia and Body Condition Training Data
2603.26754.paper_summary: No publicly available, ML ready datasets exist for wildlife health conditions in camera trap imagery, creating a fundamental barrier to automated health screening. We present a pipeline for generating synthetic training images depicting alopecia and body condition deterioration in wildlife from real camera trap photographs. Our pipeline constructs a curated base image set from iWildCam using MegaDetector derived bounding boxes and center frame weighted stratified sampling across 8 North American species. A generative phenotype editing system produces controlled severity variants depicting hair loss consistent with mange and emaciation. An adaptive scene drift quality control system uses a sham prefilter and decoupled mask then score approach with complementary day or night metrics to reject images where the generative model altered the original scene. We frame the pipeline explicitly as a screening data source. From 201 base images across 4 species, we generate 553 QC passing synthetic variants with an overall pass rate of 83 percent. A sim to real transfer experiment training exclusively on synthetic data and testing on real camera trap images of suspected health conditions achieves 0.85 AUROC, demonstrating that the synthetic data captures visual features sufficient for screening.
2603.26754.paper_summary_zh: 目前沒有公開可用的、適合機器學習的數據集來研究相機陷阱影像中的野生動物健康狀況，這對自動健康篩查造成了根本性的障礙。我們提出了一個生成合成訓練影像的流程，這些影像描繪了野生動物的脫毛和身體狀況惡化，來源於真實的相機陷阱照片。我們的流程從iWildCam構建了一個精心策劃的基本影像集，使用MegaDetector衍生的邊界框和在8種北美物種中進行的中心框加權分層抽樣。一個生成表型編輯系統產生控制嚴重程度的變體，描繪與疥癬和消瘦一致的脫毛情況。一個自適應場景漂移質量控制系統使用假前濾器和解耦掩膜，然後使用互補的白天或夜間指標進行評分，以拒絕那些生成模型改變原始場景的影像。我們明確將這個流程框架作為篩查數據來源。從4種物種的201個基本影像中，我們生成了553個通過質量控制的合成變體，整體通過率為83%。一個只在合成數據上訓練並在懷疑健康狀況的真實相機陷阱影像上測試的模擬到真實轉移實驗達到了0.85 AUROC，顯示合成數據捕捉到的視覺特徵足以用於篩查。
2603.26754.author: David Brundage et.al.
